legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires Preview/Reader, submit/validation, responsiveness, accessibility, network, or persistence/lifecycle flows outside the authoring DOM.

mappings.it: TC_01 — Add Header & Add Instruction Text enabled by default; texts present
TC_02 — "Add Sentence" button present; Text Description 1 editable
TC_03 — Add multiple sentences; delete enabled for extra rows; row deletes
TC_04 — No Outline / Outline radios switch; colour input accepts a value
TC_05 (author) — Sentence text + strike popups are present for find-and-fix
mappings.note: Author-side presence automated; Preview/Reader red-line + correct answer deferred (see TC_05 deferred row).

mappings.it: TC_06 — Unchecking Add Header removes Header Text from the page
TC_07 — Unchecking Add Instruction Text removes Instruction Text
TC_08 — Tag manager is present (renders when showText)

mappings.reason: UI responsiveness across mobile/desktop viewport sizes (visual)
Submit enabled only when required fields filled (Preview submit flow)

mappings.it: TC_11 — Text Description handles special characters
TC_12 — Delete is disabled for the only remaining sentence

mappings.reason: Submission works without Header/Instruction when unchecked (Preview submit flow)
Submit disabled with empty Text Description 1 (Preview validation)
Long text handled gracefully without UI break (visual/Preview)

mappings.it: TC_16 — Action Assets accepts a raw value without crashing (invalid-code handling)
mappings.note: asserts panel resilience; default/reset visual deferred

mappings.reason: Submit disabled when no sentences added (Preview validation)

mappings.it: TC_18 — Cannot add sentences beyond the source max limit (max_question=10)

mappings.reason: Accessibility — keyboard navigation & screen reader for all controls
Network disconnect error + recovery on reconnect

mappings.it: TC_22/TC_23 — Delete Component control is present (red highlight is visual)
mappings.note: Cancel-keeps-component navigation outcome deferred to runtime

mappings.it: TC_22/TC_23 — Delete Component control is present (red highlight is visual)
mappings.note: red colour is a visual assertion

mappings.it: TC_24/TC_25/TC_28 — Copy Component control is present/clickable
mappings.note: graceful when hover toolbar not mounted

mappings.it: TC_24/TC_25/TC_28 — Copy Component control is present/clickable

mappings.reason: Success pop-up "component has been copied successfully" after copy (lifecycle)
Pop-up appears each time on multiple copy actions (lifecycle)

mappings.it: TC_24/TC_25/TC_28 — Copy Component control is present/clickable

mappings.reason: Copy control hidden/disabled when no component present (lifecycle)
